scope: Consume the repo-recorded presentation dashboard handoff by surfacing persisted presentation slot status and check-out/check-in actions in the canonical workspace.

repo_recorded_figma_handoff_consumed.consumption: Implemented canonical workspace Presentation tab from persisted /api/presentation-slots rows without direct Figma calls.

changes: workspace.js now requests /api/presentation-slots for student, mentor, program-teacher, and admin roles.
workspace.js adds a Presentation tab that renders schedule, location, outline status, empty state, checked-out timestamps, checked-in timestamps, and status pills.

workspace.js shows check-out and check-in buttons only for program-teacher/admin roles and posts to the existing /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-out and /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-in endpoints.
workspace.css adds responsive presentation row/action layout.
scripts/seed-local-workspace-smoke.mjs now seeds a local-only presentation requirement and scheduled Room 101 presentation slot for credential-backed workspace smoke.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs and tests/workspace-browser-smoke.test.mjs cover the new route markers, UI state markers, local role visibility, and staff action affordances.

validation.summary: Workspace source/VM coverage passed with presentation route markers and rendered scheduled/checked-out action states.
Presentation slot API scope, conflict, check-out, check-in, invalid-status, and audit coverage still passed.
Portable smoke source checks passed; HTTP checks skipped before a base URL was provided.
Seeded seven local-only fake .test accounts plus the local presentation slot fixture without printing passwords.
Credential-backed local HTTP smoke passed for student, program-teacher, and mentor /api/presentation-slots visibility.
Signed in as the local program-teacher account and verified the Presentation tab rendered one scheduled Room 101 slot, one check-out button, and zero console errors.
Production surface leak check passed with 91 production text surfaces scanned.
Full test suite passed: 135 tests, 132 passing and 3 expected opt-in workspace smoke skips.

Aggregate check passed with alpha/cadence/predeploy/production/route/generated/site/static Cloudflare checks and full tests; live Cloudflare verification remained blocked without CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.
Whitespace check passed with line-ending warnings only.
Direct hosted workspace.js returned HTTP 200 and contained /api/presentation-slots plus data-presentation-action="check-out" on the first poll after push.

blockers.message: Hosted presentation-dashboard proof, remote Pages/D1 deployment inspection, and remote D1 verification remain blocked because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set.
blockers.next_action: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token or use an approved Cloudflare connector for read-only remote inspection and remote D1 verification.

blockers.message: Live Drive upload/download remains blocked because Cloudflare Pages is missing GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY.
blockers.next_action: Add the Drive credential secrets in Cloudflare Pages, then rerun Drive probe plus small and >5MB upload/download through a fake .test account.

next_actions: Verify hosted workspace presentation-dashboard states after deployment when live proof is available.
Persist outline approval gates beyond the current presentation slot outline_status field.
Continue celebration evidence and archive/export workflow depth while Cloudflare/Drive secrets remain blocked.

automation_efficiency.scale_signal: accepted implementation pass; no cadence change recommended

phone_tracker.reason: Google Sheets connector was not used in this run; repo-local closeout evidence was preserved.
